summary: Comprehensive testing of UI redesign with two-kitty system, God Panel, Supervisors, and MarketPerfGrid. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend components verified via Playwright.

issues: React key warnings for duplicate bot keys (bot_01, bot_09, etc.) - non-critical but should be fixed for cleaner console

passed_tests: GET /api/ returns healthy status with 74 engines
GET /api/global returns both real_kitty and sim_kitty fields
GET /api/god/stats returns golden rules and thresholds (target_wr=90%)
GET /api/god/fleet returns engine breakdown (24 market + 24 coin + 2 scalper + 24 bot = 74)
Engine type breakdown verified: 24 market, 24 coin, 2 scalper, 24 bot
Engines have required fields for MarketPerfGrid
POST /api/engines/reset-all preserves real_kitty ($300) and resets sim_kitty ($10000)
Global state separates real_open_positions and sim_open_positions

header.description: Real Kitty ($300.00) and SIM Kitty ($10000) displayed separately with proper styling

god_panel.description: Real Kitty God-level display, Golden Rules, Fleet Status, God Audits all visible

supervisor_panel.description: 8 supervisors displayed with stats, Shared Pad visible

action_items: Fix React key warnings for duplicate bot keys in MarketPerfGrid (minor, non-blocking)
critical_code_review_comments: React key warnings: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for bot_01, bot_09, etc. - likely due to duplicate engine entries in the grid when filtering
seed_data_creation: None - system uses live WebSocket data from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign complete and working. Key features: (1) Two-kitty system: real_kitty=$300 (sacred, cannot be reset), sim_kitty=$10000 (throwaway), (2) God Panel shows Real Kitty God-level, Golden Rules (target 90% WR), Fleet Status, God Audits, (3) 8 Supervisors with round-robin engine assignment (74 engines total), (4) MarketPerfGrid with filter tabs (ALL/MARKET/COIN/SCALPER/BOT), (5) WebSocket sends full_update every 20s with supervisors/god/fleet data. Note: Supervisor grid only renders after full_update arrives.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/global: Returns real_kitty, sim_kitty, real_pnl_all_time, sim_pnl_all_time, open_positions
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/god/fleet: Returns total_engines, by_type breakdown, fleet_wr, fleet_pnl
